# Solutions {.unnumbered}

## Assignment 3: Multiple Regression & Diagnostics

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(car)
```

### Question 1

**(a)**

```{r}

```

**(b)**

```{r}

```

**(c)**

```{r}

```

**(d)**

```{r}

```

### Question 2

**(a)**

```{r}

```

**(b)**

```{r}

```

**(c)**

```{r}

```

**(d)**

```{r}

```
